本頁整合 Migalastat Hydrochloride 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Galafold is indicated for long-term treatment of adults and adolescents aged 16 years and older with a confirmed diagnosis of Fabry disease (?-galactosidase A deficiency) and who have an amenable...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>hepatoportal sclerosis（98.8%）</li>
<li>hepatopulmonary syndrome（98.8%）</li>
<li>idiopathic copper-associated cirrhosis（98.8%）</li>
<li>early-onset familial noncirrhotic portal hypertension（98.8%）</li>
<li>primitive portal vein thrombosis（98.8%）</li>
<li>hepatic porphyria（98.4%）</li>
<li>mitochondrial oxidative phosphorylation disorder due to nuclear DNA anomalies（95.7%）</li>
<li>disorder of tyrosine metabolism（93.9%）</li>
<li>teratogenic Pierre Robin syndrome（93.6%）</li>
<li>nodular regenerative hyperplasia of the liver（93.0%）</li>
<li>tetrahydrobiopterin-responsive hyperphenylalaninemia/phenylketonuria（93.0%）</li>
<li>exocrine pancreatic insufficiency（92.0%）</li>
<li>disorder of phenylalanine metabolism（91.9%）</li>
<li>pyelonephritis（90.8%）</li>
<li>glycogen storage disease due to hepatic glycogen synthase deficiency（90.0%）</li>
<li>muscular lipidosis（88.3%）</li>
<li>neutral lipid storage myopathy（87.8%）</li>
<li>lysosomal lipid storage disorder（86.2%）</li>
<li>HHV-6 encephalitis（84.6%）</li>
<li>Hendra virus infection（84.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
